overall.description: A cinematic drive through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, featuring towering neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and light vehicle traffic. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows the camera briefly tilting upward to reveal the dense urban canyon before continuing down the multi-lane street past iconic landmarks including a cyberpunk Statue of Liberty.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a drive through a narrow neon-lit urban canyon. The camera briefly tilts upward around the 2.5-second mark to reveal towering glass skyscrapers before returning to the forward driving position. The Jacked and Coke neon sign becomes visible in the distance on the right as the vehicle approaches an overpass.

segments.scene_description: Driving through a semi-covered commercial corridor, the Jacked and Coke neon sign dominates the right side of the frame as the vehicle passes underneath elevated walkways. The environment is dense with holographic advertisements and glass structures, with occasional vehicles passing by.

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up into a wider intersection dominated by a massive cyberpunk Statue of Liberty on the right, holding a glowing purple orb. The California corporate building rises behind it. The vehicle continues past these landmarks as the road curves slightly, with oncoming traffic visible.

segments.scene_description: The final stretch continues through a commercial thoroughfare lined with digital billboards. The red Foodscape neon sign becomes prominent on the right as the vehicle moves past the previous landmarks. The road stretches ahead toward a distant cluster of illuminated towers, maintaining the dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a claustrophobic neon-lit urban canyon that gradually opens into a wide, landmark-filled commercial thoroughfare. It begins by navigating a narrow corridor of glass skyscrapers, with the camera briefly tilting upward to reveal the towering heights before returning to the road as a Jacked and Coke neon sign appears in the distance. As the vehicle passes under elevated walkways and through a semi-covered commercial zone, the environment becomes dense with holographic advertisements and passing traffic. The scene then expands into a wide intersection dominated by a massive cyberpunk Statue of Liberty holding a glowing purple orb, with the California corporate building rising sharply behind it. Finally, the road curves past these landmarks and continues along a thoroughfare lined with digital billboards, moving past a prominent red Foodscape sign toward a distant cluster of illuminated towers.
